channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Crosby breaks Lemieux's Penguins career assists record in 3-2 victory over the Islanders
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Sidney Crosby broke Mario Lemieux’s Pittsburgh franchise career record for assists on Michael Bunting’s power-play goal and the Penguins beat the New York Islanders 3-2 on Sunday night. Crosby has 1,034 assists, good for 12th in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles, Cowboys players brawl in tunnel after play, 3 ejected from game
item.description: Three players were ejected from the game after a brawl at the end of the Philadelphia Eagles' win over the Dallas Cowboys on Sunday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Aaron Rodgers sets dreadful NFL record as Jets crushed against Bills
item.description: New York Jets star quarterback Aaron Rodgers was sacked for an NFL record 568th time in his career on Sunday against the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: Saquon Barkley rushed for 167 yards to top 2,000 on the season, backup quarterback Kenny Pickett ran and threw for scores before departing with injured ribs, and the Philadelphia Eagles clinched the NFC East title by routing the Dallas Cowboys 41-7.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Penn State coach James Franklin says Nick Saban should be college football's commissioner
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Penn State coach James Franklin believes college football needs a commissioner and he even has a candidate in mind: former Alabama coach Nick Saban. “I think he’s the obvious choice, right?” Franklin said.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas Tech defensive back accuses Arkansas lineman of 'dirty' play during bowl game
item.description: Texas Tech Red Raiders defensive back C.J. Baskerville accused Arkansas offensive lineman Fernando Carmona of a "dirty" play in a bowl game loss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Penn State's polarizing QB Drew Allar puts critics on mute and keeps winning games
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Even when Penn State quarterback Drew Allar gets some praise, it's usually a backhanded compliment. They say he's a good game manager and stays within himself, or that he doesn't try to do too much. They mention he might not be flashy, but he gives the team a chance to win.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Clearwater Beach hosts ReliaQuest Bowl Beach Day
item.description: The ReliaQuest Bowl Beach Day on Clearwater Beach kicked off at 11 a.m. with the festivities. But fans started lining their beach chairs up for a close view of the action much earlier.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Patriots fans chant 'Fire Mayo' as team suffers blowout loss to Chargers
item.description: New England Patriots fans yelled for the team to fire Jerod Mayo on Saturday as they watched them get blown out at home by the Los Angeles Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU crushes Colorado in Alamo Bowl, 36-14
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (AP) - L.J. Martin rushed for 93 yards and two touchdowns, Jake Retzlaff passed for 151 yards, and No. 17 BYU beat 20th-ranked Colorado 36-14 in the Alamo Bowl on Saturday night. “Understanding that they have great players on the other side of the field," Martin said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ahkello Witherspoon makes last-minute interception to preserve Rams' 13-9 win over Arizona
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams spent the entire second half struggling on offense while bending just enough on defense to preserve a tiny lead. Arizona even backed Los Angeles into its own end zone in the final minute, needing just one big play to steal a win.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs' Cody Mauch adjusting to and enjoying Tampa Bay's warm winters
item.description: Bucs' offensive lineman Cody Mauch is in his second year in the NFL, which means he is spending another Christmas in paradise.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC
